_doc: M21 entry-refinement coverage matrix - one row per strategy leg (same roster as the M20 exit matrix). THE milestone's done-condition: every live leg carries a verdict per entry-filter column (shipped / passed_unshipped / honest_negative / pending / blocked:<reason> / n/a). Update in the SAME PR as any verdict-producing work. Statuses only from verified evidence (memo/sprint-log/PR refs) - never inferred. Design: docs/research/M21-entry-refinement-DESIGN.md.

legend.honest_negative: tested, failed the gate - the unfiltered entry stands

column_notes.entry_baseline: E-1 evidence pass (m21_entry_baseline.py) - status 'shipped' here means the leg's diagnostics were computed and rank-listed, not that anything changed live
column_notes.confirmation_bars: require the signal to hold N closed bars before entering (E-2)
column_notes.depth_threshold: tighter breakout-depth / setup-strength cells: donchian min_confidence, pullback pullback_frac band + adx_min (E-2)
column_notes.vol_at_entry: skip entries at extreme entry-bar ATR percentile (E-2)
column_notes.time_of_day: skip the leg's data-derived net-negative hours; same yearly walk-forward gate - no cherry-picked windows (E-2)
column_notes.p_win_head: ML P(win)-at-entry head (first_touch +1R before -1R label); primary consumer is the M18 allocator (E-3)

entry_baseline.ref: E-1 fleet baseline 2026-07-13 (m21_entry_baseline.py, trainer relay #6305 launch + #6306 readout; runtime_logs/m21_entry_baseline/2026-07-13). BTC 1h: 20.6% early-fail costing -79.3R (n=428, net +27.4R); chop-regime entries -15.1R/153t; hour:15 -15.8R. AXIS: confirmation_bars + depth_threshold.

confirmation_bars.ref: E-2 donchian round-1 sweep 2026-07-13 (m21_entry_sweep.py, relay #6309 launch, #6319/#6321 readouts; runtime_logs/m21_entry_sweep/2026-07-13). confirm_1/confirm_2 is_oos_fail on BTC 1h.

depth_threshold.ref: E-2 batch 1 SHIPPED 2026-07-13 (PR #6322 merged 9155f87, restart #6328 verified via /api/diag/version). min_confidence 0.6->0.7. E-2 donchian round-1 sweep 2026-07-13 (m21_entry_sweep.py, relay #6309 launch, #6319/#6321 readouts; runtime_logs/m21_entry_sweep/2026-07-13). depth_0.7 PASS wf 5/6 (IS 55.4->58.4 net_R, dd 21.0->16.5; OOS -20.8->-14.8, dd 30.6->25.2). Tier-3 declare proposed (min_confidence 0.6->0.7, E-2 batch 1).

time_of_day.ref: E-2 round-3 scope 2026-07-14: no shared E-1 time-of-day pocket flagged for this leg — per-leg hour cells are deliberately NOT mined (the round covered the only two shared pockets: 4h donchian hour:0, 1h equities 19-20 UTC).

p_win_head.ref: E-3 round 3 SIGNAL-BAR re-gate 2026-07-14 (parity features, PR #6381; relay #6383 launch, #6388 readout; runtime_logs/m21_entry_head_r3). CORRECTION: the round-1/2 'gate pass' was inflated by one-bar-ahead leakage - the age-0 feature anchor included the FIRST POST-ENTRY bar's close, information the live decision never has. On decision-bar features the donchian-1h pool degrades to AUC 0.457-0.562 (two folds < 0.5) with replay 4/6 at tau_0.3 only - fails the 'AUC materially > 0.55' half of the gate. The entry-pwin-donchian-1h-v1 artifact IS mirrored at stage=shadow (observe-only annotate, live decision-time track record accrual); Phase B (allocator use) is NOT supported and stays parked.

ETH 1h: 22.4% early-fail costing -144.5R (n=957, net -25.7R - the fleet's worst entry deficit on a live leg); chop entries -41.2R/235t. AXIS: confirmation_bars + depth_threshold (highest priority).

confirmation_bars.ref: E-2 donchian round-1 sweep 2026-07-13 (m21_entry_sweep.py, relay #6309 launch, #6319/#6321 readouts; runtime_logs/m21_entry_sweep/2026-07-13). confirm_1/confirm_2 is_oos_fail.

p_win_head.ref: E-3 entry-head round 1 2026-07-14 (m21_entry_head_round.py; relay #6359 launch, #6368/#6371 readouts; runtime_logs/m21_entry_head/2026-07-14). Pooled donchian-4h head (913 entries, all five 4h legs): AUC 0.61-0.727 but the tau-skip replay beats actual on net_R+maxDD only 2/4 folds at every tau (rescues bad years, costs good ones - 2024 actual +119.3 cut to ~+44). Fails the replay gate.

confirmation_bars.ref: E-2 batch 2 (2026-07-13): live confirmation twin shipped in trend_donchian unit (_confirmed_breakout, harness-parity-tested). confirm_bars: 1 declared, REPLACING the batch-1 depth cell (confirm_1 dominates IS net/dd + OOS dd at the 0.0 base; one lever per leg). wf 5/6.

depth_threshold.ref: superseded by confirm_1 in batch 2 (confirm dominates; the depth cell was live for <1h between batches). Evidence: depth_0.1 wf 5/6 but weaker IS.

rows.strategy: shadow fleet (turtle_soup, fade_breakout_4h, vwap, ict_scalp_5m, trend_donchian_1h, mgc_trend_1h, *_prop)

NOT declared; evidence stands as the family's strongest confirm datapoint (unfiltered base).

depth_threshold.ref: E-2 donchian round-1 sweep 2026-07-13 (m21_entry_sweep.py, relay #6309 launch, #6319/#6321 readouts; runtime_logs/m21_entry_sweep/2026-07-13). trend_donchian_1h depth cells fail; sol_prop depth_0.8 passes (recorded on the sol row).

time_of_day.ref: E-2 round-3 scope 2026-07-14: no shared E-1 time-of-day pocket flagged for this leg — per-leg hour cells are deliberately NOT mined (the round covered the only two shared pockets: 4h donchian hour:0, 1h equities 19-20 UTC).

p_win_head.ref: E-3 round 3 SIGNAL-BAR re-gate 2026-07-14 (parity features, PR #6381; relay #6383 launch, #6388 readout; runtime_logs/m21_entry_head_r3). CORRECTION: the round-1/2 'gate pass' was inflated by one-bar-ahead leakage - the age-0 feature anchor included the FIRST POST-ENTRY bar's close, information the live decision never has. On decision-bar features the donchian-1h pool degrades to AUC 0.457-0.562 (two folds < 0.5) with replay 4/6 at tau_0.3 only - fails the 'AUC materially > 0.55' half of the gate. The entry-pwin-donchian-1h-v1 artifact IS mirrored at stage=shadow (observe-only annotate, live decision-time track record accrual); Phase B (allocator use) is NOT supported and stays parked.

entry_baseline.ref: E-1 fleet baseline 2026-07-13 (#6306): proxy-identical XAUUSD rows - early-fail negligible (1.5%) but trending-regime entries -20.9R/158t; AXIS: vol_at_entry / depth_threshold (same as the live xauusd row).

confirmation_bars.ref: E-2 batch 2 (2026-07-13): live confirmation twin shipped in trend_donchian unit (_confirmed_breakout, harness-parity-tested). mgc shadow twin: confirm_bars: 1, parity with xauusd kept.
